modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Issues with Respondus Lockdown Browser on Chromebook

full_description_text:  
I'm having problems with the Respondus Lockdown Browser on my Chromebook. There are known issues and limitations that affect its performance in Desire2Learn. I need to understand what these issues are to better navigate my exams.
